tools.query: What are the latest OpenAI models? Keep it brief and remember that I prefer concise answers.

results.title: OpenAI models: All the models and what they're best for - Zapier
results.snippet: This is your complete guide to all of OpenAI's major models . We'll look at what each one is good for, how much they cost, and how to make the most of them in your work.

results.title: Model Release Notes - OpenAI Help Center
results.snippet: OpenAI o3 is our most powerful reasoning model that pushes the frontier across coding, math, science, visual perception, and more. It sets a new SOTA on benchmarks including Codeforces, SWE-bench (without building a custom model -specific scaffold), and MMMU.

results.title: Every OpenAI model in 2026: GPT-5, o3, Sora, and more
results.snippet: Confused by GPT-5, GPT-4.1, and others? Our clear guide breaks down the complete OpenAI models list, explaining each model's use case and pricing.

results.title: The Complete Guide to OpenAI Models in 2026: From GPT-5.2 to Open ...
results.snippet: Users are no longer asking which model is "smartest," but which model delivers the right level of reasoning, cost efficiency, and control for a specific task. This guide breaks down the entire OpenAI models lineup from the flagship GPT-5.2 family to reasoning-focused, multimodal, and open-source options like GPT-OSS.

results.title: OpenAI's New Models Could Be Its Smartest and Most Powerful
results.snippet: The new OpenAI models , 03 and 04-mini, have special abilities that could help you do research and analyze documents.
